{{Infobox character
| name = Kyri Prest
| aliases = Kyri
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| titles = Visiri, Archmage, Lieutenant, duelist, wizard, combat trainer for the Knights
| abilities = Combat Artist, water magic
| affiliations = Iron Legion, Knights, Titan Force
| introduced = The Knight
}}

''See also: [[Kyri Prest Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Kyri Prest is a legendary [[Visiri]] figure known for her extensive twenty-three season career in the [[arena]]. A highly skilled [[Combat Artist]] and powerful water elementalist, she holds the prestigious title of [[Archmage]], an honor she originally earned through her actions on the battlefield. Physically, she is characterized by red skin, a third eye, and the use of a mechanical arm. Beyond her reputation as a famous duelist and wizard, she has served as a combat instructor for the [[Knights]] and acted as a mentor in water magic. Her versatile capabilities also include piloting mechs, such as the [[Divine Titan]].}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A red-skinned [[Visiri]] and former [[Titan Force]] teacher, Kyri Prest is a famous wizard and duelist who earned her title as [[Archmage]] on the battlefield. She serves as a Lieutenant, an [[arena]] duelist, and the combat trainer and coach for the [[Knights]]. Kyri is a skilled [[Combat Artist]] who possesses three eyes, including a third eye that shines white, and an [[aura]] of pale pink close to white. Following an ambush by the [[Iron Legion]], she now utilizes high-grade, sleek silver [[Aethertech]] prosthetic arms that run with blue lights. In her duties as the narrator's teacher, she wields a wand shaped like a jagged spike of silver metal resembling a [[steel]] icicle.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Kyri Prest]] is a [[Visiri]] and has held the title of [[Archmage]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c1">''The Knight'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Kyri Prest]] is the narrator's teacher.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Kyri Prest]] has a third eye that shines white.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Kyri Prest]] has an [[Aethertech]] prosthetic arm replacing one lost in an [[Iron Legion]] ambush.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Kyri Prest]] is a skilled [[Combat Artist]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Kyri Prest]] is an [[Archmage]] who earned her title on the battlefield.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Kyri Prest]] is a Lieutenant.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Kyri Prest]] uses a wand that is a jagged spike of silver metal resembling a [[steel]] icicle.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Kyri Prest]] uses high-grade, silver and sleek prosthetic arms that run with blue lights.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Kyri has a prosthetic arm.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Kyri is a famous duelist and wizard.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Kyri has three eyes.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Kyri has red skin.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Kyri Prest]] is the combat trainer for the [[Knights]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12">''The Knight'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Kyri is a coach.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Kyri's [[aura]] is a pale pink close to white.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Kyri is an [[arena]] duelist.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Kyri was a teacher in the [[Titan Force]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c31">''The Knight'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Kyri was the narrator's mentor in water magic.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7">''The Pilot'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Iron Legion]]
[[Category:Knights]]
[[Category:Titan Force]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
